nasb.text: Moses alone, however, shall come near to the Lord, but they shall not come near, nor shall the people come up with him.”

esv.text: Moses alone shall come near to the Lord, but the others shall not come near, and the people shall not come up with him.”

cnv.text: 只有摩西一人可以走近耶和華，他們卻不可以親近；人民也不可和摩西一同上來。”

ccb.text: 只有你可以靠近我，其他人，包括全体百姓，都不得走近。”
